image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever see a face in your toast? You're not alone.
Context visual: This phenomenon is called pareidolia. Our brains are hardwired to recognize faces.
Escalation visual: It's a survival mechanism! Spotting faces helps us connect socially and identify threats.
Evidence visual: Research in cognitive psychology shows this happens across cultures and ages.
Payoff visual: So next time you see a face in your toast, remember: it’s your brain’s way of connecting the dots.
Cta visual: Like this? Follow for more fascinating insights into the human mind!
